name: PMS 开发-后端
content:
#!/bin/bash
ssh root@47.107.79.135 "
  echo '========== dev_mns_pms =========='
  cd /var/www/dev_mns_pms && echo '当前分支: '\$(git branch --show-current) && \
  echo '开始拉取最新代码......' && git pull
"

name: PMS 测试-前端
content:
#!/bin/bash
ssh root@47.107.79.135 "
  source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh  && \
  echo '========== fe_pms_erp ==========' && \
  cd /var/www/fe_pms_erp && \
  echo '当前分支: '\$(git branch --show-current) && \
  echo '开始拉取最新代码......' && git pull && \
  echo '开始打包: ' && pnpm build:clean
"
